summary.en: Jasmine uses AI to register, sell, finance, and retire renewable energy certificates (RECs).
summary.zh: Jasmine 運用 AI 來登記、銷售、融資及註銷再生能源憑證（REC）。

highlight.en: Its AI reads unstructured data such as CRM notes, PDFs, and images to auto-complete webforms and filings, turning a manual, error-prone REC process into a self-healing one.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 能讀取 CRM 筆記、PDF、圖片等非結構化資料，自動填寫網路表單與申報文件，把原本手動易出錯的 REC 流程變成可自我修復的自動化作業。

summary.en: Entvin builds AI agents that support regulatory teams in the life sciences industry.
summary.zh: Entvin 打造 AI 代理，協助生命科學產業的法規團隊。

highlight.en: Its platform automates complex regulatory workflows to help life-sciences firms navigate compliance and accelerate approvals while keeping data secure and confidential.
highlight.zh: 其平台自動化複雜的法規流程，協助生命科學公司處理合規與加速審批，同時確保資料安全與保密。

summary.en: Relevium Medical is developing an injectable gel therapeutic for knee osteoarthritis.
summary.zh: Relevium Medical 正在開發治療膝關節骨關節炎的注射式凝膠療法。

highlight.en: Preclinical testing showed the drug selectively blocks pain-transmitting nerves and provides relief lasting four times as long, offering an alternative to repeat injections and opioids; it has secured $3.7M in non-dilutive funding.
highlight.zh: 臨床前測試顯示該藥物可選擇性阻斷傳遞疼痛的神經，止痛效果持久達四倍，可取代反覆注射與鴉片類藥物；已獲得 370 萬美元非稀釋性資金。

summary.en: Clearline is an AI operating system that helps car dealerships capture missed revenue.
summary.zh: Clearline 是一套 AI 作業系統，協助汽車經銷商抓回流失的營收。

highlight.en: It captures, routes, and converts every revenue opportunity across a dealership without adding headcount.
highlight.zh: 它能擷取、分流並轉化經銷商各環節的每一個營收機會，無須增加人力。

summary.en: Velontra is building a hypersonic space plane that can take off from any runway in any weather.
summary.zh: Velontra 正在打造一架可從任何跑道、在任何天氣下起飛的高超音速太空飛機。

highlight.en: Its air-breathing propulsion is up to 6x more fuel efficient than rockets and uses atmospheric oxygen to add payload; the team includes government executives and a NASA astronaut and holds millions in contracts and LOIs.
highlight.zh: 其吸氣式推進系統的燃油效率比火箭高出最多 6 倍，並利用大氣中的氧氣來增加酬載；團隊包含政府高層與一名 NASA 太空人，並握有數百萬美元的合約與意向書。

summary.en: Instant is a backend platform for AI-coded apps, providing auth, permissions, storage, presence, and streams.
summary.zh: Instant 是專為 AI 編寫應用打造的後端平台，提供身分驗證、權限、儲存、在線狀態與串流。

highlight.en: It gives an AI a real backend with everything needed to ship apps users will love.
highlight.zh: 它為 AI 提供真正的後端，具備推出讓使用者喜愛的應用所需的一切。

summary.en: HyperDX is open-source, developer-friendly observability for resolving production bugs faster.
summary.zh: HyperDX 是開源、對開發者友善的可觀測性工具，協助更快解決正式環境的錯誤。

highlight.en: Built on ClickHouse and S3, it correlates logs, metrics, traces, and session replays in one place and claims up to 10x savings versus vendors like Datadog.
highlight.zh: 它建構於 ClickHouse 與 S3 之上，能在同一處關聯日誌、指標、追蹤與工作階段重播，並宣稱相較 Datadog 等廠商可節省最多 10 倍成本。

summary.en: Chordio is a Claude Code design workspace that lets product teams prototype on top of existing products.
summary.zh: Chordio 是一個建構於 Claude Code 的設計工作區，讓產品團隊能在既有產品上製作原型。

highlight.en: Its Workbench clones a product's front-end from the browser and compiles it for a coding agent, so non-technical members can prototype in minutes without source-code access or complex setup.
highlight.zh: 其 Workbench 能從瀏覽器複製產品前端並編譯成編碼代理可處理的程式碼，讓非技術成員無須存取原始碼或複雜設定，幾分鐘內就能製作原型。

summary.en: Stackup is a smart account platform that helps businesses manage their on-chain crypto operations.
summary.zh: Stackup 是一個智慧帳戶平台，協助企業管理鏈上加密資產營運。

highlight.en: It gives businesses centralized control over decentralized assets, automating complex blockchain tasks with built-in security and real-time management.
highlight.zh: 它讓企業能集中掌控去中心化資產，以內建安全機制與即時管理自動化複雜的區塊鏈作業。

summary.en: Superpowered AI offered an API for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in LLM applications.
summary.zh: Superpowered AI 提供用於 LLM 應用的檢索增強生成（RAG）API。

highlight.en: Its API connected external knowledge sources like regulatory archives to LLMs, using proprietary RAG technology to improve retrieval performance and reliability.
highlight.zh: 其 API 能將法規檔案等外部知識來源連接至 LLM，運用專有的 RAG 技術提升檢索效能與可靠性。

summary.en: Blitz is a no-code platform for non-technical users to build internal and customer-facing apps.
summary.zh: Blitz 是一個無程式碼平台，讓非技術使用者打造內部與面向客戶的應用。

highlight.en: Pitched as an alternative to Google Sheets and Airtable without their record or API-rate limits, it lets users build data models, dynamic forms, and workflows with granular permissions.
highlight.zh: 它定位為 Google Sheets 與 Airtable 的替代方案，且無其紀錄數量或 API 速率限制，讓使用者以細緻的權限建立資料模型、動態表單與工作流程。

summary.en: Raven builds AI assistants for manufacturing plants to support day-to-day operations.
summary.zh: Raven 為製造工廠打造 AI 助理，支援日常營運。

highlight.en: Its assistants help with training, job planning, troubleshooting, reporting, and real-time analytics while integrating with existing systems to make operations safer and more efficient.
highlight.zh: 其助理可協助訓練、工作規劃、故障排除、報告與即時分析，並與既有系統整合，讓營運更安全、更有效率。

summary.en: Seaflight Technologies builds aerodynamic flow control that boosts the range and payload of electric aircraft.
summary.zh: Seaflight Technologies 開發氣動流場控制技術，提升電動飛機的航程與酬載。

highlight.en: Its flow-control tech increases range and payload by 30% and has been de-risked through testing backed by the NSF, US Air Force, and Australian Government; its first product is a fixed-wing cargo drone.
highlight.zh: 其流場控制技術可將航程與酬載提升 30%，並已透過 NSF、美國空軍與澳洲政府支持的測試降低風險；首款產品為固定翼貨運無人機。

summary.en: Evoly provides smart electric and water meters as a service for utilities.
summary.zh: Evoly 以服務形式為公用事業提供智慧電表與水表。

highlight.en: Its plug-and-play, claimed-5x-cheaper meters wirelessly send consumption data to utilities, enabling remote reading, fraud detection, remote shutoff, and time-of-use pricing.
highlight.zh: 其隨插即用、宣稱便宜 5 倍的電表能無線傳送用量資料給公用事業，支援遠端抄表、偵測竊電、遠端斷電與時段計價。

summary.en: Apply Design is an AI-powered virtual staging app for real estate professionals.
summary.zh: Apply Design 是一款由 AI 驅動的虛擬佈置應用，專為房地產專業人士打造。

highlight.en: It virtually stages over 10,000 properties monthly, generating photorealistic designs in one click with instant, fully controllable customization of any detail.
highlight.zh: 它每月虛擬佈置超過 1 萬間房產，一鍵生成逼真擬真的設計，並可即時、完全自訂任何細節。

summary.en: Phind was an AI search engine that used multi-step reasoning to answer questions.
summary.zh: Phind 是一個運用多步驟推理回答問題的 AI 搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: It applied multi-step reasoning to find the best answer and used generative UI to present results in an interactive way.
highlight.zh: 它運用多步驟推理找出最佳答案，並以生成式 UI 將結果以互動方式呈現。

summary.en: Aragorn AI is building an operating system for HR and People Ops in the AI era.
summary.zh: Aragorn AI 正在打造 AI 時代的人資與人力營運作業系統。

highlight.en: It starts by solving the painful, overlooked problem of HR data integrations, then grows into personalized, agentic HR analysts that any team can create and deploy on its own.
highlight.zh: 它先從解決常被忽視又棘手的人資資料整合問題著手，再延伸成任何團隊都能自行建立與部署的個人化、代理式人資分析師。

summary.en: Slauth.io was an IAM policy copilot that generated and rightsized identity access policies.
summary.zh: Slauth.io 是一個 IAM 政策副駕駛，能產生並適切調整身分存取政策。

highlight.en: It used pull requests to suggest secure, functional IAM policies and integrated with Terraform for seamless end-to-end policy creation and deployment.
highlight.zh: 它透過 Pull Request 建議安全且實用的 IAM 政策，並與 Terraform 整合，實現端到端的政策建立與部署。

summary.en: AnythingLLM is an all-in-one, open-source on-device AI productivity app for desktop and mobile.
summary.zh: AnythingLLM 是一款一站式、開源的裝置端 AI 生產力應用，支援桌面與行動裝置。

highlight.en: With 56K GitHub stars, it aims to make local AI practically useful for everyday users across desktop and mobile.
highlight.zh: 它在 GitHub 上獲得 5.6 萬顆星，目標是讓本地端 AI 在桌面與行動裝置上對一般使用者真正實用。

summary.en: Quinn is an AI that delivers high-stakes pharma R&D decisions in days instead of months.
summary.zh: Quinn 是一款 AI，能在數天而非數月內做出高風險的製藥研發決策。

highlight.en: It tackles the most consequential drug-development choices, such as which drugs to bet on, what to develop next, and how to reach patients.
highlight.zh: 它處理藥物開發中最關鍵的抉擇，例如該押注哪些藥物、接下來該開發什麼，以及如何把藥送到患者手中。

summary.en: Cobbery deploys AI agents that give litigation teams added capability on every matter.
summary.zh: Cobbery 部署 AI 代理，為訴訟團隊在每個案件上增添助力。

highlight.en: Born out of 9-figure litigation, its AI agents are staffed on every matter to give litigators superpowers.
highlight.zh: 源自數億美元規模的訴訟，其 AI 代理被配置於每個案件，賦予訴訟律師超能力。

summary.en: Roforco is a top Roblox game studio creating viral AI consumer apps and games.
summary.zh: Roforco 是 Roblox 上頂尖的遊戲工作室，打造爆紅的 AI 消費應用與遊戲。

highlight.en: Founded by two 17-year-old high school dropouts, its 7 original titles have been played by over 100 million users, peaking at 10.2 million monthly active users.
highlight.zh: 由兩名 17 歲的高中輟學生創立，旗下 7 款原創遊戲累計玩家超過 1 億，最高月活躍使用者達 1,020 萬。

summary.en: UpLink is document collection software for accountants, auditors, and lawyers.
summary.zh: UpLink 是為會計師、稽核員與律師打造的文件收集軟體。

highlight.en: Built by a team that worked as auditors and engineers at PwC, it tackles the firsthand pain of collecting thousands of documents from clients.
highlight.zh: 由曾在 PwC 擔任稽核員與工程師的團隊打造，針對向客戶收集數千份文件的親身痛點而生。

summary.en: Blockscope is a Web3 data platform for spinning up live or historical on-chain data pipelines.
summary.zh: Blockscope 是一個 Web3 資料平台，可快速建立即時或歷史的鏈上資料管線。

highlight.en: Likened to AWS for on-chain data, it offloads and stores the blockchain data customers need and layers on services like contract analytics, wallet profiling, webhooks, and push notifications.
highlight.zh: 它被比喻為鏈上資料版的 AWS，能卸載並儲存客戶所需的區塊鏈資料，並疊加合約分析、錢包剖析、Webhook 與推播通知等服務。

summary.en: Slingshot is AI that analyzes medical records in seconds to check if diagnoses are supported by evidence.
summary.zh: Slingshot 是一款 AI，能在數秒內分析病歷，檢查診斷是否有臨床證據支持。

highlight.en: Founded by former Google/Microsoft and Lyft/Tesla engineers, it grew out of their frustration with inflated medical bills, aiming to save patients money with less work.
highlight.zh: 由曾任職 Google／Microsoft 與 Lyft／Tesla 的工程師創立，源於他們對誇大醫療帳單的不滿，目標是讓患者省錢又省力。

summary.en: Vizzly provides customer-facing analytics for modern SaaS products.
summary.zh: Vizzly 為現代 SaaS 產品提供面向客戶的分析功能。

highlight.en: It offers the flexibility of an in-house build with minimal technical overhead required.
highlight.zh: 它兼具自建開發的彈性，同時所需的技術負擔極低。

summary.en: CAPSULE was a mobile app to save and buy things found on any social media platform.
summary.zh: CAPSULE 是一款行動應用，可儲存並購買在任何社群平台上看到的商品。

highlight.en: Users snap a screenshot of anything they like and it searches the entire internet via machine learning to instantly return shoppable links.
highlight.zh: 使用者只要截圖喜歡的任何商品，它就會透過機器學習搜遍整個網際網路，立即回傳可購買的連結。

summary.en: Coverage Cat is an AI-native insurance broker that fixes coverage limits and finds cheaper premiums.
summary.zh: Coverage Cat 是一家 AI 原生的保險經紀，能修正保障額度並找到更便宜的保費。

highlight.en: Its AI-first approach drives search, support, and shopping while human agents provide fast answers so customers get the right coverage at the best price.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 優先的做法驅動搜尋、客服與比價，同時由真人專員提供快速解答，讓客戶以最佳價格取得正確的保障。

summary.en: Poly is an intelligent personal cloud storage platform that aims to replace Finder and File Explorer.
summary.zh: Poly 是一個智慧個人雲端儲存平台，目標是取代 Finder 與檔案總管。

highlight.en: It offers multi-modal natural-language search and a fast, native-feeling interface to find, organize, tag, view, edit, and share files.
highlight.zh: 它提供多模態自然語言搜尋與快速、近乎原生體驗的介面，可尋找、整理、標記、檢視、編輯與分享檔案。

summary.en: Dialect was an AI copilot for forms, questionnaires, and RFX responses.
summary.zh: Dialect 是一個用於表單、問卷與 RFX 回覆的 AI 副駕駛。

highlight.en: It used AI trained on a company's internal knowledge to automate response generation for forms, RFPs, and other complex business communications.
highlight.zh: 它運用以公司內部知識訓練的 AI，自動生成表單、RFP 及其他複雜商務溝通的回覆。

summary.en: Penguin AI was an AI sales rep that acted on website intent signals for B2B companies.
summary.zh: Penguin AI 是一個 AI 業務代表，能根據網站意圖訊號為 B2B 公司行動。

highlight.en: It identified the exact people and companies visiting a site and auto-sequenced personalized outreach to book more demos without scaling headcount.
highlight.zh: 它能辨識造訪網站的確切人員與公司，並自動排序個人化的開發信，在不增加人力下預約更多產品展示。

summary.en: Paragon AI automatically turns sales calls into structured CRM data.
summary.zh: Paragon AI 能自動將業務通話轉換為結構化的 CRM 資料。

highlight.en: It converts call recordings into structured information that updates the CRM directly, freeing reps from manual data entry and keeping pipeline data current.
highlight.zh: 它將通話錄音轉換成可直接更新 CRM 的結構化資訊，讓業務免於手動輸入資料，並使商機管線資料保持最新。

summary.en: Lyra is a crypto-native virtual card provider that lets users spend crypto anywhere online.
summary.zh: Lyra 是一家加密原生的虛擬卡供應商，讓使用者在任何線上場景花用加密貨幣。

highlight.en: Through its Chrome extension, users create virtual cards funded with cryptocurrency directly from the browser for purchases and subscriptions.
highlight.zh: 透過其 Chrome 擴充功能，使用者可直接在瀏覽器中建立以加密貨幣儲值的虛擬卡，用於購物與訂閱。

summary.en: Notebook Labs built decentralized, anonymous, and accountable identity for Web3 using zero-knowledge proofs.
summary.zh: Notebook Labs 運用零知識證明，為 Web3 打造去中心化、匿名且可究責的身分。

highlight.en: It provided anonymous proof-of-humanity and credential aggregation, enabling Sybil-resistant airdrops, DAO verification, and lower-collateralized lending without anyone linking identity to a Notebook.
highlight.zh: 它提供匿名的人類身分證明與憑證彙整，支援抗女巫攻擊的空投、DAO 驗證與低抵押貸款，且無人能將身分與 Notebook 帳戶連結。

summary.en: Stellar was an AI-powered goals platform using GPT to help teams write and track SMART goals.
summary.zh: Stellar 是一個 AI 驅動的目標平台，運用 GPT 協助團隊撰寫並追蹤 SMART 目標。

highlight.en: Its fool-proof platform helped teams set goals at every level and automated the manual, redundant tasks that drain time from high-impact work.
highlight.zh: 其簡單易用的平台協助團隊在各層級設定目標，並自動化那些佔用高影響力工作時間的手動、重複性任務。

summary.en: Malama Health offers doula-led holistic support during and after pregnancy at no cost to patients.
summary.zh: Malama Health 提供由陪產員主導、孕期與產後的整體照護，且對患者完全免費。

highlight.en: It is in-network with Aetna, UnitedHealthcare, Anthem, Kaiser, and several Medicaid Managed Care Plans, and is backed by the Stanford d.school and Y Combinator (S22).
highlight.zh: 它已納入 Aetna、UnitedHealthcare、Anthem、Kaiser 及多個 Medicaid 管理式照護計畫的網路，並獲得史丹佛 d.school 與 Y Combinator（S22）支持。

summary.en: Payload is a developer-first headless CMS and application framework.
summary.zh: Payload 是一個以開發者為先的無頭 CMS 與應用框架。

highlight.en: Crafted from the ground up in clean, well-structured code, it builds the backend and admin panel for websites, native apps, ecommerce, and SaaS to save engineers time.
highlight.zh: 它以乾淨、結構良好的程式碼從零打造，為網站、原生應用、電商與 SaaS 建立後端與管理面板，為工程師節省時間。

summary.en: Hype is a mobile app to trade memecoins and crypto and send crypto to friends.
summary.zh: Hype 是一款行動應用，可交易迷因幣與加密貨幣，並轉帳加密貨幣給朋友。

highlight.en: It bundles memecoin and crypto trading with peer-to-peer crypto transfers in one iOS app.
highlight.zh: 它在一款 iOS 應用中整合了迷因幣與加密貨幣交易，以及點對點的加密貨幣轉帳。

summary.en: 100x is a platform to create, share, and monetize AI agents.
summary.zh: 100x 是一個可建立、分享並將 AI 代理變現的平台。

highlight.en: It lets users build AI agents and turn them into shareable, revenue-generating products.
highlight.zh: 它讓使用者打造 AI 代理，並將其轉化為可分享、能產生收入的產品。

summary.en: Neosync is an open-source anonymization and synthetic data platform.
summary.zh: Neosync 是一個開源的資料匿名化與合成資料平台。

highlight.en: It lets regulated FinTech, HealthTech, and InsureTech companies create production-like data and sync it across environments for testing and ML, without the risk of using real production data.
highlight.zh: 它讓受嚴格監管的金融科技、健康科技與保險科技公司能建立貼近正式環境的資料，並跨環境同步用於測試與機器學習，避免使用真實正式資料的風險。

summary.en: Grai is open-source version control for metadata.
summary.zh: Grai 是一個用於後設資料的開源版本控制工具。

highlight.en: By understanding how data relates across disconnected systems, it can predict how database changes will affect deployed ML models, APIs, and dashboards.
highlight.zh: 藉由理解資料在互不相通的系統間如何關聯，它能預測資料庫變更將如何影響已部署的機器學習模型、API 與儀表板。

summary.en: Artemis Search is a vector database search that better matches results to query intent.
summary.zh: Artemis Search 是一款向量資料庫搜尋，能讓結果更貼合查詢意圖。

highlight.en: Instead of textual or semantic similarity, it uses special-purpose deep-learning models to reason about how well results match intent, avoiding matches that merely look like the query.
highlight.zh: 它不採用文字或語意相似度，而是運用特定用途的深度學習模型來推斷結果與意圖的契合程度，避免只是表面相似的匹配。

summary.en: Argovox built voice AI agents to automate patient billing and collections for healthcare providers.
summary.zh: Argovox 打造語音 AI 代理，為醫療院所自動化患者帳單與催收作業。

highlight.en: Its agents handle complex, multi-turn billing conversations over voice and text, targeting the up-to-20% of margins providers lose to subpar collections.
highlight.zh: 其代理能透過語音與文字處理複雜的多輪帳單對話，瞄準醫療院所因催收不佳而流失的最多 20% 利潤。

summary.en: Boton is accounting software with an AI agent for SMBs in Latin America.
summary.zh: Boton 是一款搭載 AI 代理的會計軟體，服務拉丁美洲的中小企業。

highlight.en: An autonomous agent prepares real-time financial statements, and Boton matches each business with a partner accountant who can review the books and answer questions.
highlight.zh: 由自主代理即時編製財務報表，Boton 並為每家企業媒合一位合作會計師，協助審核帳目並解答疑問。

summary.en: Sunpia lets developers deploy serverless infrastructure without rewriting their code.
summary.zh: Sunpia 讓開發者無須重寫程式碼即可部署無伺服器架構。

highlight.en: Developers annotate their code and Sunpia automatically designs a microservice version they can deploy on their own cloud, capturing serverless cost and speed benefits.
highlight.zh: 開發者只需為程式碼加上註解，Sunpia 便自動設計出可部署於自家雲端的微服務版本，享有無伺服器的成本與速度優勢。

summary.en: Solum Health provides AI automation for therapy practices, built by practice owners.
summary.zh: Solum Health 由診所經營者打造，為治療診所提供 AI 自動化。

highlight.en: Its Voice AI handles intakes, prior authorizations, referrals, and scheduling to turn therapy admin chaos into automated calm.
highlight.zh: 其語音 AI 處理初診接案、事前授權、轉介與排程，把治療診所的行政混亂化為自動化的井然有序。

summary.en: Jamble is a secondhand fashion resale marketplace powered by live streaming and video.
summary.zh: Jamble 是一個以直播與影片為核心的二手時尚轉售市集。

highlight.en: The mobile-first, iOS-launched app gives resellers video and live-streaming tools to sell more effectively and connects the sustainable fashion community.
highlight.zh: 這款行動優先、在 iOS 上線的應用，提供轉售者影片與直播工具以更有效銷售，並串連永續時尚社群。

summary.en: MovingLake provides real-time data connectors for event-driven architectures.
summary.zh: MovingLake 為事件驅動架構提供即時資料連接器。

highlight.en: Described as Fivetran for event-driven architectures, it powers customers like Casai with real-time order and price-change data.
highlight.zh: 它被形容為事件驅動架構版的 Fivetran，為 Casai 等客戶提供即時的訂單與價格變動資料。

summary.en: Eugit Therapeutics targets drug delivery to specific tissues to reduce toxicity and trial failures.
summary.zh: Eugit Therapeutics 致力於將藥物精準遞送至特定組織，以降低毒性與試驗失敗率。

highlight.en: Its TAGHOME platform uses T cell receptors to deliver drugs precisely to diseased tissue, starting with the 3.1 million U.S. patients with inflammatory bowel disease; co-founded by George Church.
highlight.zh: 其 TAGHOME 平台運用 T 細胞受體將藥物精準遞送至病變組織，首先鎖定美國 310 萬名發炎性腸道疾病患者；由 George Church 共同創立。

summary.en: Cisterna Biologics develops technology for high-quality mRNA for therapeutic applications.
summary.zh: Cisterna Biologics 開發技術，產製可用於治療的高品質 mRNA。

highlight.en: It uses proprietary methods, such as ribozyme 'molecular scissors' to remove double-stranded RNA, to solve mRNA's quality, quantity, longevity, and cost challenges.
highlight.zh: 它運用專有方法，例如以核糖核酸酶這類「分子剪刀」去除雙股 RNA，解決 mRNA 在品質、產量、穩定性與成本上的挑戰。

summary.en: Banabo is ML-based marketing attribution infrastructure aiming to cut marketing waste to zero.
summary.zh: Banabo 是一套以機器學習為基礎的行銷歸因基礎設施，目標是將行銷浪費降到零。

highlight.en: It maps a visitor's entire journey to a sale to show each touchpoint's true impact, and is built as a fully cookieless solution using zero personal data to comply with GDPR, CCPA, and iOS privacy changes.
highlight.zh: 它描繪訪客直到成交的完整旅程，以呈現每個接觸點的真實影響，並打造為完全不使用 Cookie、零個人資料的方案，以符合 GDPR、CCPA 與 iOS 隱私變更。

summary.en: Denormalized was a serverless real-time data platform for fast querying without managing infrastructure.
summary.zh: Denormalized 是一個無伺服器的即時資料平台，可快速查詢且無須管理基礎設施。

highlight.en: It automated schema inference from sample data and supported SQL transformations, letting engineers build real-time pipelines without complex systems like Flink.
highlight.zh: 它能從樣本資料自動推斷結構並支援 SQL 轉換，讓工程師無須 Flink 這類複雜系統即可建立即時資料管線。

summary.en: Elessar offers AI-powered tools that boost engineering productivity.
summary.zh: Elessar 提供 AI 驅動的工具，提升工程生產力。

highlight.en: It integrates with existing dev tools to automatically generate changelogs, streamline communications, and provide AI-powered reporting for engineers and managers.
highlight.zh: 它與既有開發工具整合，自動生成變更紀錄、簡化溝通，並為工程師與管理者提供 AI 驅動的報告。

summary.en: Mercator was an AI-assisted data analytics platform for writing faster, cheaper, smarter SQL.
summary.zh: Mercator 是一個 AI 輔助的資料分析平台，可更快、更省、更聰明地撰寫 SQL。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-Instacart data scientists, including a Berkeley physics PhD and a former Uber engineer who built the 12M-download pydeck library, it was backed by Y Combinator and Tribe Capital.
highlight.zh: 由前 Instacart 資料科學家創立，成員包含一位柏克萊物理博士與一位曾打造下載量達 1,200 萬的 pydeck 函式庫的前 Uber 工程師，並獲 Y Combinator 與 Tribe Capital 支持。

summary.en: Versa is a merchant-owned network providing smart receipts for business spend.
summary.zh: Versa 是一個由商家擁有的網路，為商務支出提供智慧收據。

highlight.en: Merchants securely send purchase details to buyers, automating government-mandated receipt capture, reducing chargebacks, and growing sales.
highlight.zh: 商家安全地將購買明細傳送給買方，自動化政府規定的收據擷取、減少退單並提升銷售。

summary.en: Makeasite lets users create websites from just a prompt.
summary.zh: Makeasite 讓使用者僅憑一段提示就能建立網站。

highlight.en: Users build a website with prompts and share it with one click when done.
highlight.zh: 使用者以提示打造網站，完成後一鍵即可分享。

summary.en: Dittofeed is an open-source customer engagement and messaging automation platform.
summary.zh: Dittofeed 是一個開源的客戶互動與訊息自動化平台。

highlight.en: An open-source alternative to Klaviyo and Customer.io, it can be self-hosted free to automate messages across email, SMS, push, and WhatsApp, and can be embedded into other SaaS products.
highlight.zh: 作為 Klaviyo 與 Customer.io 的開源替代方案，它可免費自架以跨電子郵件、簡訊、推播與 WhatsApp 自動化訊息，並能嵌入其他 SaaS 產品。

summary.en: CodeCanary uses AI to find and fix bugs by exploring your product like a user.
summary.zh: CodeCanary 運用 AI 像使用者一樣探索你的產品，以找出並修復錯誤。

highlight.en: When it finds a bug, mistake, or UX issue, it automatically creates a pull request with a fix.
highlight.zh: 當它發現錯誤、缺失或 UX 問題時，會自動建立一個附帶修復的 Pull Request。

summary.en: Boundo uses generative AI to automate outbound sales, replacing SDRs.
summary.zh: Boundo 運用生成式 AI 自動化外撥銷售，取代 SDR。

highlight.en: Users describe their ideal customer, and the platform finds and contacts high-quality leads automatically with near-human, conversion-tuned outbound emails.
highlight.zh: 使用者只需描述理想客戶，平台便自動找到並聯繫高品質潛在客戶，並以近乎真人、針對轉換率調校的開發信進行接觸。

summary.en: ilumadata helped teams ship analytics code faster and with fewer errors.
summary.zh: ilumadata 協助團隊更快地交付分析程式碼，且錯誤更少。

highlight.en: Pitched as Retool for data pipelines, it gave less-technical people easy-to-use tools to edit data pipelines.
highlight.zh: 它定位為資料管線版的 Retool，為較不具技術背景的人提供易用工具來編輯資料管線。

summary.en: BricksAI was an open-source AI gateway for enterprises to manage LLM provider usage.
summary.zh: BricksAI 是一個開源的 AI 閘道，供企業管理各服務對 LLM 供應商的使用。

highlight.en: It let teams create API keys with rate, spend, and expiration limits, and offered SSO-based role access control plus fine-grained metrics on cost, requests, and tokens per key.
highlight.zh: 它讓團隊建立具速率、花費與到期限制的 API 金鑰，並提供以 SSO 為基礎的角色存取控制，以及每把金鑰在成本、請求數與權杖上的細緻指標。

summary.en: BlueHill is one platform for client management, communication, and projects.
summary.zh: BlueHill 是一個整合客戶管理、溝通與專案的單一平台。

highlight.en: It replaces the patchwork of project apps, shared inboxes, portals, and spreadsheets with built-in email, onboarding workflows, project management, and a branded client portal in one place.
highlight.zh: 它以一體化的內建電子郵件、入門流程、專案管理與品牌化客戶入口，取代專案應用、共享收件匣、入口網站與試算表的拼湊組合。

summary.en: EthosX is a protocol for building financial derivatives on blockchains.
summary.zh: EthosX 是一個在區塊鏈上建構金融衍生品的協議。

highlight.en: Starting with crypto options, it lets users buy on-chain, perpetual tokens (e.g. a bitcoin hedging token) directly without exchanges, clearinghouses, or counterparties.
highlight.zh: 從加密選擇權起步，它讓使用者無須交易所、結算所或交易對手，即可直接購買鏈上、永續的代幣（例如比特幣避險代幣）。

summary.en: WithIda is an AI teammate for founders and small teams that works across their tools.
summary.zh: WithIda 是為創辦人與小型團隊打造的 AI 隊友，能跨工具運作。

highlight.en: Ida handles outreach, follow-ups, competitor monitoring, and briefings across connected tools, starting supervised and earning autonomy over time so you delegate rather than abdicate.
highlight.zh: Ida 跨已連接的工具處理開發、跟進、競品監控與簡報，先在監督下運作並隨時間贏得自主權，讓你是在委派而非放手不管。

summary.en: Popsy is an AI tool that finds leads on Reddit and sends them hyper-personalized DMs.
summary.zh: Popsy 是一款 AI 工具，能在 Reddit 上找到潛在客戶並發送高度個人化的私訊。

highlight.en: It automates Reddit lead generation by identifying prospects and reaching them with hyper-personalized direct messages.
highlight.zh: 它透過辨識潛在客戶並以高度個人化的私訊接觸，自動化 Reddit 上的潛在客戶開發。

summary.en: Hypestream helps livestream sellers get more sales.
summary.zh: Hypestream 協助直播賣家提升銷售。

highlight.en: It focuses on boosting conversions and sales for sellers running livestream commerce.
highlight.zh: 它專注於為經營直播電商的賣家提升轉換率與銷售。

summary.en: Mistle is an open-source platform for running collaborative background agents.
summary.zh: Mistle 是一個用於執行協作式背景代理的開源平台。

highlight.en: Positioned as the open-source alternative to internal agent platforms like Stripe Minions and Shopify River, it lets teams run collaborative background agents from day one without months of building.
highlight.zh: 它定位為 Stripe Minions、Shopify River 等內部代理平台的開源替代方案，讓團隊無須耗費數月自建，第一天就能執行協作式背景代理。

summary.en: Manatee was DocSend for demos, tracking how prospects interact with product demos.
summary.zh: Manatee 是產品展示版的 DocSend，追蹤潛在客戶與展示內容的互動。

highlight.en: It let teams see everything about how prospects engaged with their demos, then convert them into paying customers.
highlight.zh: 它讓團隊洞悉潛在客戶與其展示內容互動的一切，進而將其轉化為付費客戶。

summary.en: Pluralith automates cloud infrastructure compliance and documentation from the codebase.
summary.zh: Pluralith 直接從程式碼自動化雲端基礎設施的合規與文件作業。

highlight.en: It generates infrastructure diagrams from Terraform state; customers like Jefferson Health use it to automate compliance and save 5 hours a week per infrastructure engineer.
highlight.zh: 它能從 Terraform 狀態生成基礎設施圖；Jefferson Health 等客戶用它自動化合規，每位基礎設施工程師每週可省下 5 小時。

summary.en: Atlas is an e-signature API built for AI agents.
summary.zh: Atlas 是一個為 AI 代理打造的電子簽署 API。

highlight.en: Send any document and Atlas detects fields, pre-fills data, and returns a signable link in a single API call, with no templates or manual setup.
highlight.zh: 傳送任何文件，Atlas 便在單一 API 呼叫中偵測欄位、預填資料並回傳可簽署連結，無須範本或手動設定。

summary.en: Payfura was a global fiat-to-crypto on/off-ramp payment gateway for web3 applications.
summary.zh: Payfura 是一個全球性的法幣與加密貨幣出入金支付閘道，服務 web3 應用。

highlight.en: It supported 150+ fiat and 100+ crypto currencies across regions including the US, Europe, LATAM, SEA, and Africa, handling local payment methods plus KYC and AML compliance.
highlight.zh: 它支援超過 150 種法幣與 100 種加密貨幣，涵蓋美國、歐洲、拉美、東南亞與非洲等地區，並處理在地支付方式以及 KYC 與 AML 合規。

summary.en: Wand Solar enables landlords to generate income from solar panels on their properties.
summary.zh: Wand Solar 讓房東能透過自家房產上的太陽能板創造收入。

highlight.en: By empowering landlords to sell solar energy directly to their tenants, it makes adopting solar a no-brainer for income-property owners.
highlight.zh: 它讓房東能直接把太陽能電力賣給租客，使收益型房產的業主採用太陽能變得理所當然。

summary.en: KemNet supplies pharmacies with reformulated drugs tailored to specific groups of patients.
summary.zh: KemNet 為藥局供應針對特定患者族群重新調配的藥物。

highlight.en: Over 30 pharmacies rely on it for reformulated erectile-dysfunction products that work up to 8 times faster, alongside reformulations for hair growth, pain, weight loss, and women's health.
highlight.zh: 超過 30 家藥局倚賴它供應作用速度快達 8 倍的重新調配勃起功能障礙產品，並涵蓋生髮、止痛、減重與女性健康的重新調配藥物。

summary.en: TypeLess is an AI messaging API that generates smart, context-aware response suggestions.
summary.zh: TypeLess 是一個 AI 訊息 API，能生成智慧、具情境感知的回覆建議。

highlight.en: It enhances messaging across industries, for example automating real-estate viewing scheduling and inquiries, or giving support agents faster, personalized response suggestions.
highlight.zh: 它強化各產業的訊息往來，例如自動化房地產看屋排程與詢問，或為客服人員提供更快、個人化的回覆建議。

summary.en: Sculpt offers fully automated should-cost analysis for precision manufacturers.
summary.zh: Sculpt 為精密製造商提供全自動的應有成本分析。

highlight.en: Its AI converts manufacturing drawings into costing quotations in minutes rather than weeks.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 能在數分鐘而非數週內，將製造圖紙轉換成成本報價。

summary.en: Delfino AI uses generative AI to automate administrative work in healthcare.
summary.zh: Delfino AI 運用生成式 AI 自動化醫療行政作業。

highlight.en: It automates the repetitive phone calls that providers' offices make to insurance payors.
highlight.zh: 它自動化醫療院所打給保險給付方的重複性電話。

summary.en: FlatX is an AI-powered rental platform for young urban renters in India.
summary.zh: FlatX 是一個由 AI 驅動的租屋平台，服務印度的年輕都市租客。

highlight.en: Billed as India's first AI rental platform for young renters, it helps them find the right flat and flatmate faster, without brokers, scams, or the usual chaos.
highlight.zh: 它被稱為印度首個專為年輕租客打造的 AI 租屋平台，協助他們更快找到合適的房子與室友，免去仲介、詐騙與一般的混亂。

summary.en: InVision Medical Technology uses AI to diagnose heart disease from ultrasound interpretation.
summary.zh: InVision Medical Technology 運用 AI 從超音波判讀中診斷心臟疾病。

highlight.en: Its clinically integrated models identify diseases human readers may miss, with research published in Nature, Nature Medicine, Lancet Digital Health, and JAMA Cardiology, plus a late-breaking trial presented at the European Society of Cardiology.
highlight.zh: 其整合於臨床流程的模型能找出真人判讀可能漏掉的疾病，研究發表於《Nature》、《Nature Medicine》、《Lancet Digital Health》與《JAMA Cardiology》，並在歐洲心臟病學會發表了突破性臨床試驗。

summary.en: Lotus was an open-core pricing and billing engine for usage-based pricing.
summary.zh: Lotus 是一個開放核心的計價與帳單引擎，用於用量計價。

highlight.en: It let API companies automate custom usage-based pricing for any metric, from metering to invoicing to testing new prices, with free self-hosted software plus paid cloud and enterprise tiers.
highlight.zh: 它讓 API 公司能針對任何指標自動化自訂的用量計價，涵蓋計量、開立發票到測試新價格，並提供免費自架軟體以及付費雲端與企業方案。

summary.en: Guardian Bio is developing a dendritic cell-based platform for cancer therapy.
summary.zh: Guardian Bio 正在開發以樹突細胞為基礎的癌症治療平台。

highlight.en: It takes a patient's stem cells, turns them into therapeutic dendritic cells trained against that patient's tumor, and reintroduces them to revitalize the immune system's killer cells against multiple cancer targets.
highlight.zh: 它取出患者的幹細胞，轉化成針對該患者腫瘤訓練過的治療性樹突細胞，再回輸體內，以重振免疫系統的殺手細胞並針對多個癌症標靶。

summary.en: Dev Tools AI provided AI-powered web and mobile test automation.
summary.zh: Dev Tools AI 提供由 AI 驅動的網頁與行動測試自動化。

highlight.en: It helped teams scale automation by leveraging LLMs and computer vision.
highlight.zh: 它運用 LLM 與電腦視覺，協助團隊擴展自動化規模。

summary.en: Keylika is an early-stage biopharma developing a wearable patch to treat iron deficiency anemia.
summary.zh: Keylika 是一家早期生物製藥公司，開發用於治療缺鐵性貧血的穿戴式貼片。

highlight.en: Its transdermal iron patch aims to be the world's first prescription iron patch, delivering a novel iron drug without the GI side-effects of oral supplements or the risks of IV infusions.
highlight.zh: 其經皮鐵劑貼片目標成為全球首款處方鐵質貼片，遞送新型鐵劑藥物，且無口服補充劑的腸胃副作用或靜脈注射的風險。

summary.en: Star lets anyone make games with AI, no coding required.
summary.zh: Star 讓任何人都能用 AI 製作遊戲，無須撰寫程式碼。

highlight.en: Users describe the game they want and iterate to create complex, playable games without writing code, building creative tools for the next generation of game makers.
highlight.zh: 使用者只需描述想要的遊戲並反覆調整，即可在不寫程式碼下打造複雜、可遊玩的遊戲，為下一代遊戲創作者打造創意工具。

summary.en: Ruleset was a SaaS decision engine for lenders.
summary.zh: Ruleset 是一個為放款機構打造的 SaaS 決策引擎。

highlight.en: It provided lenders with a software-based engine to power their lending decisions.
highlight.zh: 它為放款機構提供以軟體為基礎的引擎，驅動其放款決策。

summary.en: Champ is an AI sales development representative (SDR).
summary.zh: Champ 是一個 AI 銷售開發代表（SDR）。

highlight.en: It automates the sales development rep role with AI.
highlight.zh: 它以 AI 自動化銷售開發代表的工作。

summary.en: Integrated Reasoning builds faster processors for solving NP-complete problems.
summary.zh: Integrated Reasoning 打造更快的處理器，用於求解 NP 完全問題。

highlight.en: Its processors are tailored to the memory access patterns of Karp's 21 NP-complete problems, making computations like airline-pilot scheduling and container packing 100x to 10,000x faster.
highlight.zh: 其處理器針對 Karp 的 21 個 NP 完全問題的記憶體存取模式設計，讓航空機師排班、貨櫃裝載最佳化等運算快上 100 至 10,000 倍。

summary.en: Alma was a gamified mobile banking app where users could win $1M every Wednesday.
summary.zh: Alma 是一款遊戲化的行動銀行應用，使用者每週三都有機會贏得 100 萬美元。

highlight.en: It combined mobile banking with a weekly prize draw offering a chance to win $1M every Wednesday.
highlight.zh: 它將行動銀行與每週抽獎結合，提供每週三贏得 100 萬美元的機會。

summary.en: ECSA's AI agent runs the entire international trade operation, from customs to cross-border payments.
summary.zh: ECSA 的 AI 代理掌管整個國際貿易營運，從報關到跨境支付。

highlight.en: Built by a Central Bank-licensed FX bank, its agent handles customs, cross-border payments, and trade finance, powering over USD 1B in annual volume across more than 17,000 transactions.
highlight.zh: 由一家持有中央銀行外匯執照的銀行打造，其代理處理報關、跨境支付與貿易融資，每年驅動超過 10 億美元的交易量，涵蓋逾 17,000 筆交易。

summary.en: Knowtex makes doctors 2x more efficient with AI note-taking and charge capture.
summary.zh: Knowtex 透過 AI 記錄與費用擷取，讓醫生效率提升 2 倍。

highlight.en: It creates visit notes with accurate reimbursement codes from doctor-patient conversations, tackling the $125B lost annually to improper documentation amid over 145,000 billing codes.
highlight.zh: 它從醫病對話生成附帶正確給付代碼的就診紀錄，瞄準每年因文件不當而流失的 1,250 億美元，並因應超過 145,000 個帳單代碼的複雜度。

summary.en: Tennr digitizes the flow of paperwork between healthcare providers for faster patient experiences.
summary.zh: Tennr 將醫療院所之間的文件流程數位化，帶來更快的就醫體驗。

highlight.en: It built RaeLM (a 7B model trained on 3M+ documents) to read messy referral faxes, PDFs, and handwritten notes, then coordinates with the doctor and texts patients to schedule appointments.
highlight.zh: 它打造了 RaeLM（一個以逾 300 萬份文件訓練的 70 億參數模型），用以讀取雜亂的轉介傳真、PDF 與手寫筆記，再與醫生協調並傳簡訊給患者安排門診。
